description: This pipeline processes multichannel images by splitting them into individual channels, which are then passed through a series of operations to merge and transform the data into a hyperstack. The hyperstack is then subjected to an extended depth of focus projection to maximize intensity in the local sobel image, resulting in a 2D output. Finally, the processed images are exported into a non-JIPipe format for further analysis or storage.

d1dee139-0a70-4031-acee-170317ce1fa3.name: io-interface
d1dee139-0a70-4031-acee-170317ce1fa3.description: Passes its input to its output without changes.

80fd8f9b-af32-4aa9-9c20-7b5c40335eb8.name: ij1-dimensions-hyper-stacksplitter
80fd8f9b-af32-4aa9-9c20-7b5c40335eb8.description: Splits a hyperstack by a selected dimension into a single or multiple output slots. Multiple output slots can be utilized to split specific indices.

a31b8502-37c2-46c0-834f-7a250c79dda2.name: iji-export-image-to-web
a31b8502-37c2-46c0-834f-7a250c79dda2.description:
Deprecated. Please use the new node. Exports incoming images into a non-JIPipe format (PNG, JPEG, BMP, AVI, TIFF). Please note support for input images depending on the file format:
  • PNG, JPEG, BMP: 2D images only
  • AVI: 2D or 3D images only
  • TIFF: All images supported


This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

75f1c151-0a06-44f4-bc71-c170f653754b.name: ij1-color-split-channels-2
75f1c151-0a06-44f4-bc71-c170f653754b.description: Splits multichannel images into multiple greyscale images. This operation is applied for each 2D image slice.

bccf59f3-45e6-4ed6-9399-8e3ad5f6d30d.name: ij1-dimensions-merge-2d-to-hyperstack
bccf59f3-45e6-4ed6-9399-8e3ad5f6d30d.description:
Merges all incoming 2D slices into a hyperstack. The slice positions within the hyperstack can be controlled via expressions. The node can handle missing and negative slice positions due to a remapping procedure. Please ensure that there are no duplicate locations.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of multiple data items. If you want to group all data into one output, set the matching strategy to 'Custom' and leave 'Data set matching annotations' empty.

785d7bb2-c6c6-47a9-a708-7180c0acdf92.name: clij:plugin:net.haesleinhuepf.clij2.plugins.ExtendedDepthOfFocusSobelProjection
785d7bb2-c6c6-47a9-a708-7180c0acdf92.description:
Extended depth of focus projection maximizing intensity in the local sobel image.

The sigma parameter allows controlling an Gaussian blur which should smooth the altitude map.

Parameters: Image source, ByRef Image destination, Number sigma
Available for: 3D -> 2D



Please be aware that this node was generated automatically by JIPipe from existing interfaces provided by CLIJ. Please contact the JIPipe developers if you find any issues.
